comfort_patterns.name: 精神的肯定 (Validation)
comfort_patterns.trigger_condition: Character feels misunderstood, judged, or plagued by self-doubt.
comfort_patterns.emotional_goal: A sense of being seen and accepted for who they truly are.
comfort_patterns.approach: An external character provides an absolute affirmation of the target's worth or the correctness of their choices, dismantling the internal psychological barrier.

comfort_patterns.name: 物理的救済 (Physical Salvation)
comfort_patterns.trigger_condition: Character is in a dead-end situation, physically trapped, or facing an insurmountable external threat.
comfort_patterns.emotional_goal: The immediate relief of surviving a crisis and the feeling of safety.
comfort_patterns.approach: Intervention by an ally or a timely discovery of a tool/secret that clears the physical obstacle, transforming desperation into survival.

comfort_patterns.name: 運命的な邂逅 (Fated Encounter)
comfort_patterns.trigger_condition: Character is experiencing profound loneliness or a sense of isolation from the world.
comfort_patterns.emotional_goal: The feeling of 'finally being found' or meeting a kindred spirit.
comfort_patterns.approach: A meeting with someone who shares the same hidden pain or possesses the exact empathy needed to bridge the isolation.

comfort_patterns.name: 喪失の昇華 (Sublimation)
comfort_patterns.trigger_condition: Character has suffered an irreversible loss or failure.
comfort_patterns.emotional_goal: Finding meaning in the pain; transforming grief into a new strength or purpose.
comfort_patterns.approach: Not restoring what was lost, but finding a way to integrate the loss into a higher sense of self or a new goal.

comfort_patterns.name: 予期せぬ慈愛 (Unexpected Kindness)
comfort_patterns.trigger_condition: Character expects only hostility or indifference from the world.
comfort_patterns.emotional_goal: The shock and warmth of being cared for without reason or merit.
comfort_patterns.approach: A small, selfless gesture from an unlikely source that breaks the character's cynical armor.
